item.title: Just enjoying the silent show.
item.description: I removed the audio because it was just a song and it takes away from what the dog is experiencing silently.
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: Boys & Girls both need emotional guidance growing up
item.description: If you're not growing on your own emotional intelligence journey, how can you possibly help a young person? Abuse is terrible & the worst. Full stop. Get help. Manipulation is almost as bad .. because they don't develop their own emotional wellness and independence. Leaving them open for others to manipulate later. Ignoring / negligence is almost as bad .. because other influences at random may be equally destructive long term. The ONLY answer is to take responsibility because they are YOUR children. And the responsibility is to get over your own fears, emotional growth and other challenges. Get involved and worry about perfection later!! They need you.
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: So ya, thought ya, might like to go to the show...
item.description: I am an overweight, bald, bearded, 40 something year old white man. Half my shirts advertise car parts and the other half, old rock bands. I have no interest in changing anything, except the overweight part... maybe... one day... I take a lot of pride in being good to people, regardless of race, religion, sex orientation, or gender identity. I've always supported civil rights, women's rights, the right to privacy, and gun control. I work every day to teach my kids to be the same way. Thankfully she defended.
item.dc:creator: downintheparkwithafriendcalledfive

item.title: What if?
item.description: It’s an interesting question regarding States rights and individuals rights. Does Ohio check if it’s citizens imbibed prostitution and cannabis, both illegal in Ohio?

item.title: western european cities, big famous ones, are a lot farther north than I thought they were
item.dc:creator: aap71

item.title: 35 years deserves 12 layers
item.description:
Bought myself a ridiculous extravagant cake for my birthday because WHY NOT?! Caramel 12 layer cake... HEAVENLY. I have so much cake left...
Cat tax: black toe beans Of course imgurians love cake! Thanks for the birthday love! I bought my cake from a local bakery called Flirt with Dessert on Wilmington Island, Georgia for those inquiring minds... www.flirtwithdessert.com DO order yourself the most ridiculous cake from a local Bakery for your next birthday. It feels AWESOME. 10 stars. Cheers, friends! Stay weird, imgur.
item.dc:creator: EnigmaWearingHeels

item.title: The heroes we need.
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
Source(s): https://thehill.com/blogs/in-the-know/3551714-rage-against-the-machine-says-abort-the-supreme-court-in-return-to-stage/ https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-news/tom-morello-trumpers-dancing-rage-against-the-machine-killing-in-the-name-1087221/ I hate to share this source, but here we are. No need to click the link, the whole article is above. https://nypost.com/2020/06/10/tom-morello-responds-angry-rage-against-the-machine-is-political/ Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/cWpMKDX (continued) Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: The Democratic Leader of the PA State House
item.dc:creator: springelmogizmo

item.title: Oh dear God in Kyrgyzstan glacier collapse ￼Juuka Gorge
item.description:
This isn’t snow in an avalanche this is ice that used to be a PERMANENT feature. This happened only in the last day or so.
If you’re wondering why they didn’t realise the danger or move.
Living every day truly feeling life is good, is worth fighting for sending love for everyone. Nothing is impossible.
item.dc:creator: Recycledflowers

item.title: Just another day in the land of the Free

item.title: Get off my lawn!
item.description: USA, California: Sea lions chasing people at a beach in San Diego! Lifeguards were on standby in the water ensuring no one was hurt. It's recommended people stay at least 50 ft away from sea lions.
item.dc:creator: WakeUp2Yourself
